revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fix-span here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{content|}}}|{{{content|}}}}}{{#switch:{{{subst|¬}}} |¬={{category handler |template= |nocat={{{nocat|true}}} }} |SUBST=}}{{Category handler |main={{Fix/category |cat-date={{{cat-date|}}} |cat={{{cat|}}} |cat-date2={{{cat-date2|}}} |cat2={{{cat2|}}} |cat-date3={{{cat-date3|}}} |cat3={{{cat3|}}} |date={{{date|}}} }} |template={{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}||{{#if:{{{date|}}}||}}}}}} |subpage=no }}{{#if:{{{special|}}} |{{{special|}}} |[{{#if:{{{pre-text|}}} |{{{pre-text}}} }}[[{{{link|Wikipedia:Cleanup}}}|{{{text|}}}]]{{#if:{{{post-text|}}} | {{{post-text}}} }}] }} [[Category:Inline cleanup templates| ]] [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]] [[Category:Templates needing substitution checking]] [[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates]] [[Category:Templates including undated clean-up tags]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
